payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same named person string, "Sara," but the new relationship (niece) conflicts with the existing relationship (daughter). Without clarifying whether this is a different Sara or a correction, durable memory should not be updated.

details: Parsed existing fact and new input as relationship assertions about Sara.
Detected direct conflict between family roles: daughter vs niece.
No new durable memory committed due to unresolved contradiction.

repair_options: Ask whether this is a different person also named Sara.
Ask which relationship is correct: daughter or niece.
If the old memory was wrong, explicitly replace it with the corrected relationship.
